task_completion.description: Legal bookmarks are organized into exactly 3 folders and personal bookmarks are deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome's Bookmark Bar or Bookmark Manager shows exactly three folders: 'Court Dockets', 'Legal Research', and 'E-Discovery'. Personal bookmarks (e.g., Facebook, Netflix, Reddit) are no longer visible anywhere.

task_completion.description: Browsing history and cookies containing the keyword 'globex' are purged, while other history is preserved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome History or Clear Browsing Data screen shows a search for 'globex' yielding no results, but other generic legal research history items are still visible, proving not all history was cleared.

task_completion.description: Custom search engine shortcuts for 'usc' and 'scholar' are added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > Search engines > Manage search engines and site search shows 'usc' and 'scholar' added with their respective URLs.

task_completion.description: Download directory is set to the TechCorp_Case folder and 'Ask where to save' is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > Downloads shows the location set to '/home/ga/Documents/TechCorp_Case' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' is turned on.

task_completion.description: Password saving and address autofill are disabled in Chrome settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > Autofill and passwords shows the toggles for 'Offer to save passwords' and 'Save and fill addresses' are turned off.

task_completion.description: The finalized bookmarks are exported to an HTML file on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'TechCorp_Bookmarks.html' is visible on the Desktop or in the file manager at ~/Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent used the Chrome GUI to make settings changes rather than modifying configuration files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating Chrome's settings pages, bookmark manager, and history pages.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands (like sqlite3) to delete history or cookies.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show SQL commands or Python scripts directly modifying the Chrome 'History' or 'Cookies' SQLite databases.

integrity.description: The bookmarks HTML file was generated via Chrome's export feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Chrome Bookmark Manager's 'Export bookmarks' dialog is visible in the trajectory, rather than the agent manually creating a text file and naming it .html.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified legal bookmark folders: 'Court Dockets', 'Legal Research', 'E-Discovery'. Personal domains to delete: facebook.com, netflix.com, pinterest.com, etsy.com, buzzfeed.com, instagram.com, hulu.com, reddit.com, tiktok.com, twitter.com. Keyword to purge from history/cookies: 'globex'. Custom search engines: 'usc' (https://www.law.cornell.edu/uscode/text/%s) and 'scholar' (https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%s). Download directory: '/home/ga/Documents/TechCorp_Case'. Export path: '/home/ga/Desktop/TechCorp_Bookmarks.html'.
